title: Obione megalotheca
taxonomy: Obione megalotheca is classified as a species of flowering plant in the family Amaranthaceae, commonly known as the pigweed family. This family is part of the order Caryophyllales and the class Magnoliopsida. The class Magnoliopsida is within the division Magnoliophyta, which includes all flowering plants. intro: Obione megalotheca, also known as the coastal glasswort, is a succulent halophyte plant that thrives in coastal areas and is characterized by its distinctive glassy leaves.
